title: Melanortocarya obtusifolia

The Rutaceae family is a group of plants characterized by their aromatic leaves and fragrant flowers. This family includes a wide variety of species, many of which are economically important for their fruits and essential oils. The classification of Melanortocarya obtusifolia within the Rutaceae family reflects its evolutionary history and shared characteristics with other members of this family.
